race.comment: NOCTUA (4) shapes as the main danger after she showed a devastating turn of foot first-up to run slick time when saluting by 2 lens over 1000m at Parkes. Another with the upside to go on with it this preparation. DAWN ON ME (9) gets in light with the claim after gripping on late to finish third over 1000m at Parkes. Set to peak at her third run back and can take a hand in the finish. BEDDA MIA (12) was well fancied last time when she broke through for a maiden win over 1080m at Canberra Acton. In the mix. DITTERICH (2) is bursting to break through with three placings at last runs, the latest a narrow loss over 1100m at Mudgee on May 10. One for consideration.
